utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan, all 5 items are present. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: (1) health_coverage: includes two options with plan names, monthly premiums, and benefits; costs included—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes plan name, monthly premium, and benefits; costs included—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: includes plan name, monthly premium, and benefits; costs included—fully specified. (4) additional_services: listed as a set of services but no explicit costs provided—costs missing, so not fully specified per the format requirement. (5) total_budget: provides monthly totals for Option A and Option B—cost breakdown present (monthly, approximate), so specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified with all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each plan named in the final coverage plan to the exact items listed in the ground-truth ratings. Health coverage includes PrimeCare Premium Plan and LifeFirst Standard Plan; property coverage includes EliteHome Premium Coverage; travel coverage includes EliteTravel Premium Plan. We then pull their corresponding ratings from the ground-truth data.
